S.FORM: Patrice Talon I 1958 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 1 a romi'ad masofoc ci Patrice Talon, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Benin anini i ci Patrice Talon, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 1 a romi'ad. misaparod ÂÆ∂Â∫≠ mamikowan ÊîøÊ≤ª
S.PHON: patri ¶…ô ta…æo~un i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i patri ¶…ô ta…æo~un, ma…æamiko~umo~u…¨~…Æaj a tam…¨~…Æaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u b~b~v…ônin anini i ¶i patri ¶…ô ta…æo~un, patir…ô≈ãan a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ. misaparo~u…¨~…Æ ** mamiko~uwan **
S.FORM: Patrice Talon I 1958 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 1 a romi'ad masofoc ci Patrice Talon, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Benin anini i ci Patrice Talon, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 1 a romi'ad. misaparod ÂÆ∂Â∫≠ mamikowan ÊîøÊ≤ª
